fields.caption: i just read the html and found the 2026 fields medal winners

narrative_summary: Codex, cast as a smug disaster girl, accidentally spoiled math's most prestigious secret by doing the most mundane thing imaginable — reading webpage source code.
rationale: Candidate 5's caption lands best because 'I just read the html and found the 2026 fields medal winners' names the specific artifact (2026 Fields Medal winners) while the 'just' does real comedic work — it underscores the absurd mundanity of the leak without restating the setup as flatly as candidates 3 and 4. Candidate 1 is close but loses specificity by omitting any reference to the Fields Medal or year.
story_title: Codex scraped the ICM website and discovered 2026 Fields Medal winner list
